acceptance_criteria.text: Event bus module: typed TaktEvent with entity.action naming, eventBus.on() with wildcard support, eventBus.emit() called after every mutation in routes.ts. Activity logging refactored into first event subscriber.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. Event bus integrated into all mutation routes. Activity subscriber handles logging.

acceptance_criteria.text: triggers table with schema: id, board_id, name, event_types (JSON array), conditions (JSON), action_type (enum), action_config (JSON), enabled, created_at, user_id. trigger_log table with id, trigger_id, board_id, event_type, event_payload, result, error_message, duration_ms, executed_at. Auto-prune to 500 per board.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. triggers, trigger_log, notifications tables created in db.ts migrate(). Auto-prune on insert. All CRUD helpers implemented.

acceptance_criteria.text: Webhook action: POST to configured URL with event+trigger payload, 10s timeout, 1 retry on 5xx/timeout, success/failure logged to trigger_log.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed in trigger-engine.ts executeWebhook(). AbortController for 10s timeout, 1 retry on 5xx/timeout, logged to trigger_log.

acceptance_criteria.text: Run Artifact action: executes board-level sh/js/ts artifact with TAKT_EVENT env var, captures output in trigger_log (truncated 5000 chars), errors if artifact missing.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed in trigger-engine.ts executeRunArtifact(). TAKT_EVENT env var set, output truncated to 5000 chars, board-level only.

acceptance_criteria.text: Notify action: creates notification entries for watchers/members/owner (excluding actor). notifications table with id, board_id, user_id, event_type, card_id, title, body, read, created_at.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. executeNotify() creates notifications for targeted users excluding actor. SSE push if available.

acceptance_criteria.text: Auto Action: move_card, assign_label, remove_label on card events. Infinite loop prevention: auto_action events marked _automated and skipped by trigger engine.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. executeAutoAction() handles move_card, assign_label, remove_label. Events from auto_action marked _automated: true and skipped by trigger engine.

acceptance_criteria.text: Notification API: GET /api/notifications (paginated, filterable), PATCH /api/notifications/:id/read, POST /api/notifications/read-all, GET /api/notifications/count, DELETE /api/notifications (cleanup). Built-in auto-notify for card watchers on key events.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. All 5 endpoints in routes.ts. notification-subscriber.ts auto-notifies card watchers on card.moved, card.updated, card.dates_changed, comment.created, artifact.created, artifact.updated.

acceptance_criteria.text: SSE endpoint: GET /api/boards/:boardId/events streams board events + notification.created + trigger.executed in real-time via Hono streamSSE. Auth + board membership required. Max 10 connections per board.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. SSE endpoint with ReadableStream. SSEManager enforces 10 connection cap. Token via query param for EventSource. Broadcasts board events, notification.created, trigger.executed.

acceptance_criteria.text: Trigger API: GET/POST /api/boards/:boardId/triggers, PATCH/DELETE /api/boards/:boardId/triggers/:id, POST test endpoint, GET log endpoints (per-trigger and board-wide, paginated).
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. All 7 trigger API endpoints in routes.ts with proper validation and authorization.

acceptance_criteria.text: CLI: takt trigger list/create/show/update/delete/log/test commands. takt notification list/read/count commands.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. cli-trigger.ts and cli-notification.ts with all commands. Registered in cli.ts with help text.

acceptance_criteria.text: UI Notification Bell: bell icon in board header with unread badge, dropdown with last 20 notifications, mark-as-read on click, mark-all-read button, SSE-powered live updates.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. NotificationBell.tsx with unread badge, dropdown, mark-read, mark-all-read, SSE integration via externalNotification prop.

acceptance_criteria.text: UI Triggers Management: gear icon in board header, triggers tab with list/create/edit/delete. Trigger builder with 4-step wizard (name+events, conditions, action config, review). Trigger detail with execution log.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. TriggerManager.tsx with gear icon, 4-step wizard, trigger list with enable/disable/test/delete, detail view with execution log table.

acceptance_criteria.text: UI Real-Time Board Updates: SSE connection on board load, live card/column changes from other users, 'Live' indicator, reconnection handling with fallback.
acceptance_criteria.progress: Completed. SSE connection in BoardView.tsx useEffect, auto-reload on card/column changes from other users, green 'Live' badge, reconnection via EventSource built-in behavior.
